title: A Fresh Morning
content:
Now am I a tin whistle
        Through which God blows,
        And I wish to God I were a trumpet
        But why, God only knows.
meaning:
John Collings Squire, Sir's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Fresh Morning"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
